backend/main.mo: Motoko actor managing per-session lesson progress (start, complete, score update, queries) using nested Maps keyed by session and lessonId, with blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the removal of BookOpen, MessageSquare, Hash, Layers, and HandMetal icons from all frontend components and their replacement with plain text or alternative icons.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'MuteDeaf Learning Hub' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (dashboard, TTS, STT, lessons, help, sign camera, login, signup) and wraps everything in a QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: App footer displaying copyright year, the SilentLearn tagline, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/LessonCard.tsx: Reusable card component that displays a lesson's icon, category, description, progress bar, and score, and navigates to the lesson exercise page on click.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navigation bar with a GraduationCap logo, desktop and mobile nav links, and login/logout controls using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/data/lessons.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for Exercise and Lesson, and exports a static array of lesson data covering Alphabet, Common Phrases, Numbers, Vocabulary, and ISL Sign Language with exercises including words, emojis, examples, and optional image URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHandGestureRecogni: Custom hook that dynamically loads TensorFlow.js and the Handpose model via CDN, runs hand landmark inference on a video element at intervals, and returns ISL gesture recognition results including label, confidence, and landmarks.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and exposing login status flags via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating lesson progress data (start, update score, complete) against the ICP backend actor, using a session key stored in localStorage for anonymous session tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useSTT.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech Recognition API to provide start/stop speech-to-text functionality, exposing interim and final transcripts, listening state, error messages, and browser support detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useTTS.ts: Custom hook wrapping the Web Speech Synthesis API to provide text-to-speech functionality with configurable voice and rate, exposing speak/stop controls, speaking state, available voices, and support detection.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Nunito/Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including colors, sidebar, charts, and custom pulse animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a hero section with navigation links to TTS/STT/Sign Camera tools, a stats bar showing lesson progress, and a grid of LessonCards loaded from static lesson data with per-lesson progress from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Help.tsx: Help and guide page that explains the SilentLearn app's features, including step-by-step instructions for using the ISL Sign Language Recognizer, guided practice mode, and other accessibility tools.
frontend/src/pages/LessonExercise.tsx: Interactive lesson exercise page that steps through exercises with TTS playback and STT recognition, tracks correct answers and attempts, and integrates with backend hooks to start, score, and complete lessons.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, redirects already-authenticated users to the dashboard, and displays loading/error states with a link to sign up.
frontend/src/pages/SignCamera.tsx: React page that activates the device camera to perform real-time ISL hand gesture recognition, supporting both free-form mode with optional TTS readout and a guided practice mode that checks detected signs against a target sign from query params.
frontend/src/pages/SignUp.tsx: Sign-up page that authenticates users via Internet Identity (ICP blockchain), redirecting already-authenticated users to the dashboard and explaining the passwordless/biometric login flow.
frontend/src/pages/STTTool.tsx: React page component for a Speech-to-Text tool that uses the useSTT hook to capture microphone input and display real-time transcripts, with handling for unsupported browsers and microphone permission errors.
frontend/src/pages/TTSTool.tsx: React page component for a Text-to-Speech tool that lets users type text, select a voice, adjust speech rate, and play or stop audio using the useTTS hook.
frontend/src/utils/gestureMapping.ts: Utility module for ISL hand gesture classification using 21-point MediaPipe landmarks; provides normalization, per-finger extension detection, and a pattern-matching table mapping finger states to ISL alphabet letters with confidence scores.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Nunito, Poppins), font sizes, oklch-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 21) for a learning webapp targeting mute and deaf users, documenting existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and the scope of ISL sign recognition, TTS, STT, and authentication capabilities.
